title: Material Replication
description: Simple addon to GTCEu that adds matter system like GregTech5.
body:
### What is this mod?
Material Replication is a simple addon to GTCEu that adds matter system like GregTech5. \
The latest version of this mod adds new 3 machines and new 4 materials.

### New Machines
- **Deconstructor** \
Deconstructor decomposes the corresponding material into a new MATERIAL, *Positive Matter* and *Neutral Matter*. Duration and the amount of each matter obtained depends on the material. \
A slight chance of obtaining *Primal Matter* during deconstruction.

- **Replicator** \
Replicator replicates pure MATERIAL from the *Positive Matter* and *Neutral Matter*. For duplication, the special USB with the data of the target material written on it is required.

- **Scrap Maker** \
Scrap Maker erases **all but the energy brought in**. Upon elimination, there is a small chance of obtaining Scrap, and a material, *Matter Amplifier* is obtained from Scrap.

*Matter Amplifier* is a special material that can replicate two types of matter.

### Configuration

This mod can set various things with config. \
For more information about config \
English : [here](https://github.com/MrKono/MaterialReplication/blob/master/Setting.md) \
Japanese : [here](https://github.com/MrKono/MaterialReplication/blob/master/Setting_JP.md)

What versions of GTCEu are supported? \
See [here](https://github.com/MrKono/MaterialReplication/blob/master/VersionInformation.md)
